title: Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance
summary: Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance across Azure environments using Azure Policy, Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Azure RBAC. Then enable Azure Backup security features, and infrastructure as code scanning.

sections.title: Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance
sections.summary: Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance across Azure environments using Azure Policy, Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Azure RBAC. Then enable Azure Backup security features, and infrastructure as code scanning.

lessons.title: Enforce governance with Azure Policy and resource locks
lessons.content_md:
Enforce security standards before resources reach production using Azure Policy. Assign built-in policy definitions and initiatives at management group scope, author custom definitions with automated remediation tasks, and protect critical resources from deletion using Azure resource locks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enforce-governance-azure-policy-resource-locks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Enforce governance with Azure Policy and resource locks

lessons.title: Configure security controls and remediate recommendations in Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
Configure Defender for Cloud security standards at management group scope and systematically deploy security controls to remediate recommendations at scale using Fix, governance rules, Policy remediation tasks, and exemptions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-defender-cloud-security-controls/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure security controls and remediate recommendations in Defender for Cloud

lessons.title: Evaluate regulatory compliance in Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use Microsoft Defender for Cloud to assess, investigate, and report on compliance posture against security frameworks including the Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark, regulatory standards, and custom standards.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/evaluate-regulatory-compliance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Evaluate regulatory compliance in Defender for Cloud

lessons.title: Manage and right-size RBAC role assignments for least privilege
lessons.content_md:
Implement least-privilege access governance across Azure and Microsoft Entra ID. Assign built-in roles at appropriate scope, create custom roles for Azure resources and Microsoft Entra directory operations, and identify and remediate overprivileged access using Microsoft Entra access reviews and Defender for Cloud CSPM identity insights.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-right-size-rbac-role-assignments/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and right-size RBAC role assignments for least privilege

lessons.title: Protect backup data with Azure Backup security features
lessons.content_md:
Protect Azure Backup data against ransomware, accidental deletion, and rogue administrators. Configure enhanced soft delete, vault immutability, Multi-User Authorization with Resource Guard, and RBAC controls to achieve an Excellent security posture rating across Recovery Services vaults.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/protect-backup-data-azure-backup-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect backup data with Azure Backup security features

lessons.title: Implement security controls in infrastructure as code
lessons.content_md:
Embed security controls into infrastructure as code pipelines to prevent noncompliant Azure resources from reaching production. Integrate IaC security scanning using Microsoft Defender for DevOps and the MSDO extension, and configure Azure Policy in a policy-as-code workflow to enforce security compliance at deployment time.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-security-controls-infrastructure-as-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement security controls in infrastructure as code

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Enforce security governance and regulatory compliance**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
